table.name: learning_analytics_daily
table.Comment: 学生每日学习数据统计表

table.name: student_experiment_submission
table.Comment: 学生实验/实训提交记录表

column.name: diagnosis_level
column.Comment: 诊断等级：EXCELLENT-优秀, GOOD-良好, TO_IMPROVE-待提升

column.name: diagnosis_report
column.Comment: 诊断报告详细内容（JSON或富文本）

column.name: recommend_resources
column.Comment: 推荐学习资源ID列表（JSON数组）

column.name: diagnosis_level
column.Comment: 诊断等级：EXCELLENT-优秀, GOOD-良好, TO_IMPROVE-待提升

column.name: audit_status
column.Comment: 审核状态：PENDING-待审核, APPROVED-审核通过, REJECTED-审核驳回

column.name: schedule_info
column.Comment: 授课周期及课时安排描述

column.name: audit_status
column.Comment: 审核状态：PENDING-待审核, APPROVED-审核通过, REJECTED-审核驳回

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态：0-停用, 1-进行中, 2-已结课

column.name: project_type
column.Comment: 项目类型：EXPERIMENT-实验, TRAINING-实训

column.name: audit_status
column.Comment: 审核状态：PENDING-待审核, APPROVED-审核通过, REJECTED-审核驳回

column.name: audit_status
column.Comment: 审核状态：PENDING-待审核, APPROVED-审核通过, REJECTED-审核驳回

column.name: status
column.Comment: 任务状态：NOT_STARTED-未开始, IN_PROGRESS-进行中, CLOSED-已截止

column.name: category_name
column.Comment: 分类名称（课件、习题、视频、文档等）

column.name: is_completed
column.Comment: 是否已完成学习：0-未完成, 1-已完成

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态：SUBMITTED-已提交, GRADED-已批改, RETURNED-已退回（需重交）

column.name: is_published
column.Comment: 是否已发布：0-未发布, 1-已发布

column.name: is_completed
column.Comment: 是否已完成本章节学习

column.name: announce_type
column.Comment: 公告类型：SCHOOL-全校, DEPT-院系, CLASS-班级

column.name: target_dept_id
column.Comment: 目标院系ID（院系公告时填写）

column.name: target_class_id
column.Comment: 目标班级ID（班级公告时填写）

column.name: biz_type
column.Comment: 业务类型：COURSE_PLAN-开课计划, EXPERIMENT-实验实训, RESOURCE-教学资源

column.name: biz_name
column.Comment: 业务数据名称（冗余，便于查询）

column.name: action
column.Comment: 操作动作：SUBMIT-提交审核, APPROVE-通过, REJECT-驳回, WITHDRAW-撤回

column.name: login_result
column.Comment: 登录结果：SUCCESS-成功, FAIL-失败

column.name: sender_id
column.Comment: 发送人用户ID（系统消息为NULL）

column.name: message_type
column.Comment: 消息类型：NOTIFICATION-通知, REMINDER-提醒, ALERT-预警, APPROVAL-审批通知

column.name: related_biz_type
column.Comment: 关联业务类型：COURSE_PLAN, EXPERIMENT, RESOURCE, ANNOUNCEMENT等

column.name: role_code
column.Comment: 角色编码：STUDENT-学生, TEACHER-教师, ADMIN-管理员

column.name: is_deleted
column.Comment: 逻辑删除：0-未删除, 1-已删除

column.name: file_type
column.Comment: 文件类型：PPT, PDF, DOC, XLS, MP4, ZIP等

column.name: visibility
column.Comment: 可见范围：CLASS-本班, DEPT-本院, SCHOOL-全校

column.name: audit_status
column.Comment: 审核状态：PENDING-待审核, APPROVED-审核通过, REJECTED-审核驳回
